title: Character
description: An autonomous AI agent in a Polis world. Per PRD §6.6: characters are NOT avatars — they are entities running their own lives via CharacterLifeWorkflow. Player is parent + boss + investor; character is the actor. Captures identity, personality, cognition (model pinning, decision frequency, retrieval namespaces), professions, finances, relationships, principal-agent governance. v0.1.1 adds soft_skills (canonical 9-attribute taxonomy per soft_skills.schema.json) and per-profession skills_metadata (last skill-tick week, training-load) so engine SkillTickWorkflow can evolve hard-skill values over in-world time per polis/SKILLS-DESIGN.md. v0.1.2 adds state.vital_status (life_expectancy, biological_age_modifier, chronic_conditions, death_event) referencing mortality.schema.json so the substrate can model needs-driven and acute-cause death per polis/MORTALITY-DESIGN.md. v0.1.3 amends finances per DECISION-CURRENCY-MODEL.md: introduces coin_balance (V0 primary, readOnly from ledger) + currency_unit display field; recasts pol_balance as V0.5+ readOnly real-money rail; renames starter_capital_pol → starter_capital_coin to match Coin-first V0 posture.

user_id.description: Player principal (PRD §6.6.1). Null for engine-spawned NPCs. Anti-sybil-tracked at engine level.

character_role.description: Primary: one per user, mandatory, narrative anchor, full civic rights. Secondary: paid-spawn (1K-5K POL), limited civic rights. NPC: engine-spawned, lower-tier LLM, fills labour-market gaps.

country.description: Current citizenship country. Null while stateless (e.g. between countries after migration / after country dissolution).

name.description: Character name. Substrate-fictional. LLM real-name registry refusal applies.

nationality.description: Country ID of origin (may differ from current country if migrated).

appearance.description: IPFS URI to portrait. Substrate-fictional, generated or user-uploaded.

voice_sample_uri.description: Voice cloning source (V1+ feature; V0 deferred per V0-PLAN §3.10).

archetype.description: Coarse-grained personality type (e.g. 'strategist', 'creative', 'data_nerd', 'hustler'). Free-form per industry / world.

traits.description: Personality traits (e.g. 'ambitious', 'loyal', 'competitive', 'temperamental'). Drive AI decision-making weights.

ambitions.description: Long-term goals (e.g. 'become league champion', 'retire before 35', 'found own academy').

backstory.description: Backstory paragraphs. Read by LLM when reasoning about character decisions.

cognition.description: Per-character cognition config. Pinned at spawn for in-life consistency (V0-PLAN A6). Per-character retrieval namespaces compose with industry/country/world layers (V0-PLAN §3.10).

model.description: Pinned model identifier (e.g. 'claude-3-5-sonnet-20251022'). NEVER 'latest'. Engine refuses character spawn without explicit version.

fallback_chain.description: Tiered fallback per V0-PLAN A6 (e.g. ['claude-...', 'gpt-...', 'ollama/llama3.2']). Used when primary model unavailable.

lora_adapter_uri.description: Optional LoRA fine-tune (V1+; null at V0 per V0-PLAN §3.10 deferred).

decision_frequency.description: How often CharacterLifeWorkflow wakes (1h to 7d range; default 4h per PRD §6.6). Tunable per character.

retrieval_namespaces.description: Per-character retrieval index — diary, standing orders, recent decisions. Composes with per-institution / per-industry / per-country / per-world at retrieval time.

professions.description: What the character does (one or more). Skills + experience per profession.

skills.description: JSON map keyed by skill ID (per V0-PLAN §5.1 rule 1 — no domain-shaped columns). Values are 0-100 (or per industry.professions[].base_skills.scale). Engine SkillTickWorkflow nudges values weekly per industry.professions[].base_skills[].growth_curve.

skills_metadata.description: Per-profession skill-evolution bookkeeping. Substrate-tracked, not authored at spawn (engine sets defaults). Used by SkillTickWorkflow to compute per-week deltas deterministically.

last_tick_in_world.description: In-world date of last skill tick. Engine ticks each character weekly; replays catch up by ticking forward.

training_load_per_week_hours.description: Hours per week of structured training. Modulates growth_curve.learning_rate_per_year_active. Default 25 = full-time professional. Academy / amateur lower. Engine refuses training_load that would exceed institution.operations training-capacity.

active_match_minutes_last_4_weeks.description: Recent match-minutes; sport-specific. Footballer skills decay slower with regular minutes; benched players regress toward base. Substrate-tracked.

current_overall_rating.description: Cached overall rating per industry.professions[].overall_rating_formula. Refreshed on each skill tick. Used by labour market without recomputing.

soft_skills.description: Canonical 9-attribute soft-skill profile per soft_skills.schema.json. Universal across professions: a footballer who re-skills as a manager carries soft skills forward unchanged, while hard skills are profession-scoped. Required for primary characters at spawn; optional for npc characters (engine fills with archetype-derived defaults). Soft skills evolve slowly via life events, not weekly drills — see polis/SKILLS-DESIGN.md.

finances.description: Per DECISION-CURRENCY-MODEL.md: V0 ships Coin only (off-chain, Postgres ledger). POL is V0.5+ real-money rail. Coin and POL never convert — parallel economies. Balance fields are readOnly views derived from the ledger (DECISION-LEDGER.md §10.2) — never authored at spawn.

coin_balance.description: V0 primary balance — in-substrate Coin. Derived from polis/sim ledger via LedgerPort.get_balance. Authored only as starter_capital_coin at spawn; thereafter substrate-tracked.

pol_balance.description: V0.5+ on-chain POL balance (wrapped USDC). Stays 0 at V0 (no real-money rail). Derived from the POL ledger; never directly authored.

currency_unit.description: Display unit for coin_balance. 'COIN' is the substrate default; per-country Coin symbols (e.g. 'HRT' for Hartshire pound per country.currency.symbol) apply at V0.5+ when country currencies launch as their own Coin instances per DECISION-CURRENCY-MODEL.md §3.

country_currency_balances.description: Map keyed by country currency symbol → balance. Per DECISION-CURRENCY-MODEL.md: country currencies launch as per-country Coin instances (off-chain at V0); on-chain country currencies are V1+ opt-in. Substrate-tracked, not authored at spawn (except for starter capital).

institutions_owned.description: Foreign keys to institution.schema.json — full or partial ownership; details via institution.governance.ownership.

starter_capital_coin.description: Initial Coin capital at spawn. Per PRD §11.1 — 5K Coin default at V0, varies by character_role. (Was starter_capital_pol pre-v0.1.3; renamed when Coin became V0 primary per DECISION-CURRENCY-MODEL.md.)

relationships.description: Relationship graph entries. Composes with industry / country / institution layers for substrate-wide rivalry / mentorship / family graphs (per V0-PLAN §3.8 narrative surfaces).

strength.description: Relationship strength 0-1. Substrate-tracked, evolves over time.

needs.description: Per PRD §10.2 needs vector. Substrate-tracked, decays over time, restored by consumption.

public_reputation.description: Character-level reputation, distinct from institution reputation (PRD §9.6).

cycle_state.description: Per V0-PLAN cycle-pending UX (design v2). Substrate-tracked; not authored at spawn. Set to 'deceased' atomically with state.is_alive flipping false and state.vital_status.death_event being populated.

vital_status.description: Lifetime mortality bookkeeping. Required at spawn (life_expectancy_age sampled from country.actuarial_life_expectancy + biological_age_modifier from lifestyle); chronic_conditions accrue over time; death_event populated atomically when is_alive flips false. See mortality.schema.json + polis/MORTALITY-DESIGN.md.

governance.description: Principal-agent contract per PRD §6.6.1. Player configures how character decides autonomously vs pings player for input.

auto_decide_rules.description: Routine decisions handled without pinging (e.g. 'job_application_below_exec' auto_decide).

urgency_window.description: Time window for player response. Either numeric ('24h', '7d') OR a substrate-recognised sentinel: until_kickoff (resolves before the next scheduled match), until_match_end, until_window_close (transfer window), until_signing_deadline (contract offer expiry), immediate (real-time).

standing_orders.description: Strong priors the character considers when deciding (e.g. 'always tell me before speaking to press about transfers'). Not laws — character with high autonomy traits may override per PRD §6.6.1. Surfaced in design's Inbox + Memory.

career_arc.description: Historical career — institutions held, key events. Substrate-appended over time, not fully authored at spawn.
